name: J1939FillSHM
title: J1939FillSHM
syntax: long J1939FillSHM(pg pgSDM, byte sequenceNumber, pg* pgSHM);
description: This function uses the PGN, addresses, priority and payload of a Safety Data Message (SDM) as well as a sequence number to set the payload, priority and addresses of a Safety Header Message (SHM).
The payload of the SDM consist of following signals (see SAE J1939-76):

parameters.name: pgSDM
parameters.description: The data of SDM is used to fill the SHM. DLC of SDM shall be 8.

parameters.name: sequenceNumber
parameters.description: New sequence number of the SHM.

parameters.name: pgSHM
parameters.description: SHM message to be filled. DLC of SHM shall be 8.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
